name: Mux
description: Mux provides video infrastructure APIs for uploading, encoding, streaming, and delivering video. It handles live streaming, on-demand video, direct uploads, playback IDs, signing keys, transcription vocabularies, playback restrictions, DRM, and comprehensive video analytics.

auth.note: Use HTTP Basic auth with token_id:token_secret base64 encoded.

capabilities.name: assets_create
capabilities.description: Create a new video asset from a URL. Mux transcodes it into adaptive streaming formats.

capabilities.name: assets_list
capabilities.description: List all video assets with pagination.

capabilities.name: assets_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed information about a video asset.

capabilities.name: assets_update
capabilities.description: Update an asset's metadata or passthrough string.

capabilities.name: assets_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a video asset and all associated data.

capabilities.name: assets_get_input_info
capabilities.description: Retrieve input info for an asset including file details and tracks.

capabilities.name: assets_playback_ids_create
capabilities.description: Create a playback ID for an asset. Can be public or signed.

capabilities.name: assets_playback_ids_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a playback ID from an asset.

capabilities.name: assets_tracks_create
capabilities.description: Add a text track (subtitles/captions) to an asset.

capabilities.name: assets_tracks_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a text track from an asset.

capabilities.name: live_streams_create
capabilities.description: Create a new live stream with RTMP ingest support.

capabilities.name: live_streams_list
capabilities.description: List all live streams.

capabilities.name: live_streams_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a live stream.

capabilities.name: live_streams_update
capabilities.description: Update a live stream configuration.

capabilities.name: live_streams_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a live stream.

capabilities.name: live_streams_reset_key
capabilities.description: Reset the stream key for a live stream.

capabilities.name: live_streams_complete
capabilities.description: Signal that a live stream has ended.

capabilities.name: live_streams_disable
capabilities.description: Disable a live stream, preventing new ingest.

capabilities.name: live_streams_enable
capabilities.description: Re-enable a disabled live stream.

capabilities.name: live_streams_playback_ids_create
capabilities.description: Create a playback ID for a live stream.

capabilities.name: live_streams_playback_ids_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a playback ID from a live stream.

capabilities.name: live_streams_simulcast_create
capabilities.description: Create a simulcast target to restream to another platform.

capabilities.name: live_streams_simulcast_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a simulcast target.

capabilities.name: direct_uploads_create
capabilities.description: Create a direct upload URL for client-side video uploads.

capabilities.name: direct_uploads_list
capabilities.description: List all direct uploads.

capabilities.name: direct_uploads_get
capabilities.description: Get details of a direct upload.

capabilities.name: direct_uploads_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a direct upload.

capabilities.name: signing_keys_create
capabilities.description: Create a URL signing key for signed playback.

capabilities.name: signing_keys_list
capabilities.description: List all URL signing keys.

capabilities.name: signing_keys_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a URL signing key (without private key).

capabilities.name: signing_keys_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a URL signing key.

capabilities.name: playback_restrictions_create
capabilities.description: Create a playback restriction with referrer or user-agent rules.

capabilities.name: playback_restrictions_list
capabilities.description: List all playback restrictions.

capabilities.name: playback_restrictions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a playback restriction.

capabilities.name: playback_restrictions_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a playback restriction.

capabilities.name: playback_ids_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the asset or live stream ID associated with a playback ID.

capabilities.name: delivery_usage_list
capabilities.description: List video delivery usage data.

capabilities.name: data_video_views_list
capabilities.description: List video views with filtering and pagination.

capabilities.name: data_video_views_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed info about a specific video view.

capabilities.name: data_metrics_overall
capabilities.description: Get overall metric values across all video views.

capabilities.name: data_metrics_breakdown
capabilities.description: Get metric breakdowns by dimension (browser, country, etc).

capabilities.name: data_metrics_timeseries
capabilities.description: Get metric values over time.
